PARTNER_TAGLINE: One-line description of what the partner does
PARTNER_DESCRIPTION: 2-3 sentence overview. What it is, who it's for, why MoonPay fits.
PARTNER_AUTH:
### Get an API Key

Register at https://partner.example.com

```bash
export PARTNER_API_KEY="sk_..."
```
PARTNER_ENDPOINTS:
| Endpoint | Method | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| `/api/v1/endpoint` | GET | Does something |
MOONPAY_WALLET_INTRO: One sentence explaining WHY the partner needs a MoonPay wallet (e.g. 'ExamplePartner requires an EVM wallet for payments' or 'ExamplePartner generates unsigned transactions that your wallet signs').
WALLET_LINK_INSTRUCTIONS:
```bash
mp wallet export --wallet "example-agent"
# paste key into partner setup
```
GAS_TOKEN_BUY:
Need ETH for gas?
```bash
mp buy --token eth_ethereum --amount 0.05 --wallet <address> --email <email>
```
BRIDGE_EXAMPLE:
# USDC on Polygon → USDC on Ethereum
mp token bridge \
  --from-wallet example-agent --from-chain polygon \
  --from-token 0x2791Bca1f2de4661ED88A30C99A7a9449Aa84174 \
  --from-amount 100 \
  --to-chain ethereum \
  --to-token 0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce3606eb48
GETTING_STARTED:
1. Sign up at https://partner.example.com
2. Create wallet: `mp wallet create --name "example-agent"`
3. Fund: `mp buy --token usdc_ethereum --amount 100 --wallet <address>`
4. Link wallet to ExamplePartner
5. Start using the product
6. Withdraw earnings: `mp virtual-account offramp create`
